win_condition: After round 9 final scoring, the player with the highest total victory points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player farther ahead on the score track wins; if still tied, tied player with more rubies wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Victory Points on Score Track
categories.description: All VP gained during rounds from pot scoring spaces and effects.

categories.label: Ruby Conversion
categories.description: Final VP from remaining rubies using endgame conversion rule.

categories.label: Coin Conversion
categories.description: Final VP from leftover coin value at game end using conversion rule.
